description_long: This is a medium-sized, soft-structured handbag with a rectangular base and gently rounded corners, crafted from a textured taupe material. The bag features two sturdy, wide handles made from a contrasting gray material, attached securely to the top edge for easy hand or forearm carrying. A zipper closure runs along the top, with a visible zipper pull on one side, ensuring the contents are safely enclosed. Subtle, curved gray accent lines decorate the exterior, adding a modern and understated design element. The bag appears to have a spacious main compartment, suitable for carrying personal items in an urban environment. There are no visible brand logos, decorative hardware, or external pockets, giving the bag a minimalist and functional appearance.
description: A taupe, textured handbag with gray handles and curved accent lines, featuring a top zipper closure and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face of the handbag, highlighting the two gray handles, curved gray accents, and the main zipper closure.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bag's depth, the attachment of the handles, and the zipper pull extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back panel with matching curved gray accents and the continuation of the handles and zipper.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the bag's profile, handle attachment, and the zipper pull from a different angle.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, wide handles made of gray material, non-adjustable, attached at the top for hand or forearm carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top edge, with a visible zipper pull on one side.
attribute_pattern: Curved gray accent lines on a plain taupe background.
